LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICHAEL ADAMS' MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF TONI YOUNG MUST PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. MR. ADAMS IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2018 Continued To Sep-26-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL ADAMS's Motion To Change Venue.

Defendant Michael Adams' motion to change venue to Santa Clara County is granted. Mr. Adams' motion is not untimely since it was filed within the time he was granted to respond to the complaint. The contract venue provision providing for venue in the county where the obligation was to be performed in inapplicable because that provision is only applicable where there is a writing providing where the contract is to be performed and may not be shown by parol evidence. (Weil and Brown book at 3:503-504). Plaintiff Toni Young must pay all transfer costs.

Mr. Adams is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Continued To Jun-12-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Timothy A. Chandler, Tel. No. 1-619-645-5245 appearing for the Plaintiff
by telephone appearance;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - DEFENDANT MICHAEL ADAMS' Motion To Change Venue is continued to June 12, 2018 per the agreement of the parties after conferring with Mr. Adams on the phone by the clerk. Mr. Chandler was earlier instructed by the court to call Mr. Adams and agree on a date to continue the matter and notify the court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
